name: git_tool
description: Perform Git version control operations: status, diff, add, commit, push, pull, log, checkout, and branch management. All operations run in the project's git repository.

files.description: List of file paths for operations that target specific files (add, checkout, diff).

args.description: Additional arguments to pass to the git command (e.g., ['--stat'] for diff --stat).

session_id.description: Session ID for log_manager integration. Auto-injected by the engine.
